notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brady House.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brady House.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brady House.

notableEvents.label: Keibert Ruiz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Keibert Ruiz grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Nasim Nuñez out at 2nd. Keibert Ruiz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly strikes out swinging. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Nico Hoerner steals (2) 2nd base. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Keibert Ruiz.

notableEvents.label: CJ Abrams plunked
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams hit by pitch. Daylen Lile to 3rd. Joey Wiemer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds out, shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. singles on a line drive to right fielder Michael Conforto.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
